title: phlomis javanica
intro: Phlomis javanica, also known as Java phlomis or Javan phlomis, is a plant species in the family Lamiaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in Southeast Asia, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Phlomis javanica include relief from fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and alleviate digestive problems. Phlomis javanica can be prepared as herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in traditional medicine as a poultice or topical application.
